fields.name: Interaction Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the interaction template that you have selected.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the interaction template language. This field will not be displayed in the Word attachment.

fields.name: Attachment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the linked attachment is inherited or unique.

fields.name: Custom Layout Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the report layout.

fields.name: Word Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Word template to use when you create communications for an interaction. The Word template will create either a document or be used as the body text in an email.

fields.name: Report Layout Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the report layout that will be used.

fields.name: Report Layout AppID
fields.tooltip: Specifies which app the report layout belongs to.
